scripts.infra:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && npm run infra:up
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/permissions
scripts.build:ci: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint:ci: npm run lint:ci -w apps/api && npm run lint --if-present -w packages/contracts && npm run lint --if-present -w packages/permissions
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:forbid-only -w apps/api && npm run test:forbid-only -w apps/web && npm run test -w apps/api -- --runInBand --no-coverage && npm run test -w apps/web -- --runInBand --no-coverage
scripts.test:e2e:ci: npm run test:forbid-only -w apps/api && npm run test:e2e -w apps/api -- --runInBand test/config-validation.e2e-spec.ts
